title: Swiss Ephemeris Native Module Compatibility
essence: Native Swiss Ephemeris module fails to load on certain platforms/deployments
symptoms: Astrology calculations fail with module load errors
Server crashes on startup in production
repro_steps: Deploy to different platform (e.g., Render vs local)
Check server logs for sweph load failures
root_cause: Swiss Ephemeris native module has platform-specific binaries that may not be available or compatible in all deployment environments
do_not_do: Assume native modules work across platforms
Deploy without testing native module compatibility
Ignore module load failures in production
guardrails: Implement graceful fallback for missing modules
Add platform detection and compatibility checks
prevent_tests: Test on all target deployment platforms
Verify fallback behavior when module unavailable
Check error handling for module failures

evidence.notes: Deployment critical - affects core astrology functionality
